revision_note: Delivered Summit agent workflow extension pack, including live GitHub issues #18644-#18649 and automated PR label/routing workflows. Added agent trust-boundary evaluation harness with deterministic triad artifacts, schema-gated CI verification, and drift monitoring.

initiatives.notes: Implemented `summit agent run` for computer-use simulation plans with mandatory policy declaration, deny-by-default network controls, deterministic report/metrics/stamp outputs, default-off feature flag, CI policy tests, and operational docs + drift detection script.
Implemented executable agent-task issue contract and PR labeler routing with semver auto-labeling (patch/minor/major) plus Jules/Observer route tags and canonical area labels.
Deterministic AI coding-agent trust boundary with provenance schema, CI gate, perf/determinism tests, and weekly drift detection.

Sprint 07 delivery artifacts: approvals/provenance GA sprint plan, Jira import backlog, receipt schema v1, OAS endpoints, evidence bundle checklist, and runbook procedures for stuck approvals, signing failures, policy regressions, and dual-control override audits.
Deterministic internal tooling agent scaffold with structured prompt, report/metrics/stamp schemas, CI determinism+schema gate, and default-off feature flag behavior.

BGP route-withdrawal runbook, BYOIP failover policy, multi-region/multi-ASN probe matrix, prefix-automation guardrails with rollback gates, merge-blocking routing resilience CI checks, and routing-specific PagerDuty/Slack escalation wiring.
Evidence-backed SaaS crash 2026 positioning pack, claim registry, and repo validation checklist alignment.
Deterministic governance-pack generator, governance schema, threat-model template, abuse-case fixtures, governance-pack CI enforcement, and item-scoped docs plus drift monitor.

Deterministic security debt artifacts (report/metrics/stamp/security_debt_ledger), dependency classification checks, agent provenance enforcement, CI verifier workflow, and drift detector scaffold with default-off enforcement.
Scaffold adenhq/hive subsumption bundle, required check mapping, and evidence-first lane-1 posture.
Added CI preflight for OpenLineage/OpenMetadata lockstep checks and pinned OpenLineage Python dependencies.

Logical decoding to Neo4j upsert path with provenance events, reconciliation repair loop, and harness-backed CI smoke. Added canonical Neo4j ingest write routing for Entity/Indicator/Source nodes and MENTIONS/DERIVES_FROM edges with idempotency-token sentinel gating.
Added governed controls for API deprecation denial, crawl legal gating, evidence minimum fields, provider concentration alerts, response runbook, and deterministic resilience KPIs.
PR1 scaffold for a deterministic, feature-flagged Summit agent orchestrator with tool allowlist registry, transcript evidence IDs, and smoke-tested report/metrics/stamp artifacts.
